basic_details.job_title: ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Izatnagar (ICAR IVRI) Young Professional-I (YP-I) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.ivri.nic.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation as per Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Veterinary Science / Microbiology / Biotechnology / Bioinformatics / Biochemistry / Life Sciences / Biomedical Science
qualification.details: Graduate in Veterinary Science / Microbiology / Biotechnology / Bioinformatics / Biochemistry / Life Sciences / Biomedical Science. Desirable: Experience in virological techniques like cell culture, embryonated egg inoculation, molecular techniques in Nucleic acid and protein research, cloning, expression, etc. Performing immuno-assays, ELISA, LFA, dot blot, etc. Computer skills (MS office, Excel, PPT), Conducting Field investigations and sample collection from animals.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR IVRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Vacancy Details 2026
ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Graduate in Veterinary Science / Microbiology / Biotechnology / Bioinformatics / Biochemistry / Life Sciences / Biomedical Science. Desirable: Experience in virological techniques like cell culture, embryonated egg inoculation, molecular techniques in Nucleic acid and protein research, cloning, expression, etc. Performing immuno-assays, ELISA, LFA, dot blot, etc. Computer skills (MS office, Excel, PPT), Conducting Field investigations and sample collection from animals.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation as per Rules.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Advance Application Submission

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to submit an advance application for the ICAR IVRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting an advance application for the ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) recruitment is 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post at ICAR IVRI is 21 years. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible for the recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Young Professional-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) position is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month. This is a fixed monthly remuneration.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Veterinary Science, Microbiology, Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, Biochemistry, Life Sciences, or Biomedical Science to be eligible for the Young Professional-I post.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional-I position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post at ICAR-Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Izatnagar.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at ICAR-Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Izatnagar, Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh, 243122. Candidates should report to the venue on the specified date and time.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for the ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for the ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I recruitment. Candidates from all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST, are not required to pay any fee.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates bring to the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, experience certificates (if any), and passport-size photographs to the Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: What is the last date to submit an advance application for the ICAR IVRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting an advance application for the ICAR IVRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) recruitment is 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.
